mapper.select: select * from it_system_control a inner join it_system_control_item b on a.Table_ID = b.Table_ID where b.account = #{account} and b.c_count>0 order by b.c_count desc
select account from it_system_control_item where table_id = #{tableId}
mapper.delete: delete from it_system_control_item where table_id = #{tableId} and account = #{account}
